Author: OOFGames
Name: Gamba Where
Punchline: Find and host FFXIV gambling events near you.
Description: Browse active gambling events across Eorzea or host your own session. Use /gambawhere to open the interface.
Changelog:
- Making the UI more pretty :3 Added colour picker to the settings tab.
- Re-arranged the settings tab to accomodate the new settings.
- Host gamba tab that now shows you what your event will look like on the gamba events tab.
- Moved start hosting button top right to make space for new preview section.
